overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment on a sunny day. The character navigates city streets, crosses intersections, and passes by pedestrians and vehicles in a dense cyberpunk cityscape with tall buildings and construction sites.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with commercial buildings

events.description: moving from sidewalk onto the street crosswalk
red sedan passes by on the left as character crosses the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across a city street intersection toward a large yellow hexagonal building in the distance

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving along the street from left to right
person in white shirt crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: distinctive yellow geometric high-rise building with hexagonal patterns and dark windows
massive dark gray skyscraper with vertical lines dominating the skyline ahead
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
low-rise commercial structures with various signage and storefronts
tall street light pole with orange fixture directly ahead on the road

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking down a sunlit city street toward a major intersection. The distinctive yellow hexagonal tower rises in the distance on the left while a massive dark corporate skyscraper dominates the center horizon. The character crosses the asphalt road, passing a red sedan and navigating around a street light pole as pedestrians cross ahead.

events.description: turning left toward the Kendachi building entrance
passing through the security checkpoint barriers at the building entrance

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking toward the Kendachi building entrance, navigating through pedestrians on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair and blue backpack walking ahead toward the building
security guard standing near the entrance checkpoint

entered.detail: low commercial building with prominent red neon KENDACHI signage on the roof
security barriers and gate structure at the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character turns left toward the Kendachi commercial building, identifiable by its red neon rooftop signage. After passing through a security checkpoint with barriers, the character continues along the sidewalk as the massive dark skyscraper shifts to dominate the right side of the view. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including a woman with distinctive red hair.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban sidewalk alongside corporate skyscraper

events.description: entering the narrow corridor between the tall corporate tower and adjacent buildings
slight right turn while continuing forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk next to the massive dark skyscraper, passing other pedestrians and approaching a street corner

notable_agents.action: woman in business attire walking toward the camera on the narrow sidewalk
black van driving along the street to the right of the sidewalk

entered.detail: multiple yellow construction cranes visible over the buildings on the right side
large blue and white industrial ventilation pipes running along the building exterior
modern street lamp with orange light fixture along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk pressed against the massive dark corporate tower, which now looms immediately to the left. Industrial pipes run along the building exterior while construction cranes are visible over the structures to the right. The character passes a woman in business attire and continues toward a corner where the street opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with market stalls and digital billboards

events.description: turning right at the street corner into a new commercial area
entering area with colorful market stalls and large digital advertising billboards
waiting for vehicles to pass before crossing a side street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along a busy commercial sidewalk, passing market stalls and digital billboards while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with tattoos and beige pants walking ahead on the sidewalk
blue vintage-style car with white roof driving along the street

entered.detail: colorful market stalls with awnings and various goods on display along the sidewalk
large digital advertisement screens showing animated graphics and product displays
tall wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires spanning the street
the distinctive yellow geometric building visible again in the far distance

segments.scene_description: After turning the corner, the character enters a bustling commercial area lined with colorful market stalls and large digital billboards on the left. The distinctive yellow hexagonal tower is visible again in the far distance on the right. The character follows a shirtless tattooed man along the sidewalk, navigating past utility poles and waiting for a blue vintage car to pass before continuing across a side street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sunlit cyberpunk metropolis, moving from wide open intersections into the oppressive shadow of corporate architecture before emerging into a vibrant commercial district. It begins by crossing a broad asphalt road toward a distant yellow hexagonal tower and a massive dark skyscraper that dominates the horizon. As the camera turns left toward the red neon signage of the Kendachi building, the perspective shifts through a security checkpoint and past diverse pedestrians, with the dark corporate tower gradually sliding to the right of the frame. The scene then tightens as the camera presses against the looming exterior of the dark tower, passing industrial pipes and construction cranes before rounding a corner. Finally, the environment opens up into a bustling market area filled with colorful stalls and digital billboards, following a tattooed man past a blue vintage car while the yellow tower reappears in the far distance.
